{{Quote|I'm assigned here to the library... mostly keeping it up to date with new discoveries and such.|Tamlen to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Tamlen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Acolyte]] and a member of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Tamlen was educated in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], receiving [[Sith training|training]] from the [[Sith Master/Legends|masters]] of the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] in the year [[3956 BBY]]. While at the academy, Tamlen was assigned to work in the academy's library where he would update the records with new discoveries, such as the lore of [[Ajunta Pall]]. While studying Pall, Tamlen came across a legend regarding the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] [[Sword of Ajunta Pall|blade]]. Interested, Tamlen told another student about his discoveries without knowing he was actually speaking with the amnesic [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]. Revan had been captured by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and reprogrammed to serve as their weapon against the Empire.<ref name="KOTOR" />

Following Tamlen's encounter with Revan, the former Dark Lord sought out the legendary blade in the [[Tomb of Ajunta Pall|tomb]] of Lord Pall and recovered it. Shortly thereafter, Revan returned to the academy and assassinated the Academy's Headmaster [[Uthar Wynn]] with the assistance of the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|redeemed]] Sith [[Yuthura Ban]]. Together Revan and Ban purged the academy of all Sith students who would not convert to the Jedi teachings. Tamlen, refusing to abandon the Empire, was slain along with the rest of the academy's occupants.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
